execution_history.reason: Portfolio candidate pool meets long/short count constraints on a post-fundamental and risk screening basis, supporting stepwise move to construction.
Portfolio candidate pool meets long/short count constraints on a post-fundamental and risk screening basis, supporting stepwise move to construction.

observations: All top candidate picks from episodic recall are organized by position. Longs: CAG, CCEP, BJ, DG, EPC, GIS, INGR, IPAR, KDP, KMB, KO, MO, PPC, ODD, REYN, SAM, TAP (17 confirmed, all from strong thesis/validation); more can be supplemented from high-confidence vignettes if gross/industry balance requires. Shorts: CHD, CLX, COCO, COST, EL, ELF, FIZZ, FRPT, HSY, KLG, PFGC, PM, PRMB, SFM, STZ (15 confirmed; meets 12-18 hard constraint). Both lists meet the hard constraints for portfolio construction (15-20 longs, 12-18 shorts).
